# OctoAcme Templates & Checklists

Reusable templates and checklists for each stage of the OctoAcme project lifecycle. Copy a template into your project folder, fill in the placeholders, and keep it up to date as your project evolves.

---

## Lifecycle Index

| Lifecycle Stage | Template / Checklist |
|---|---|
| **Initiation** | [Kickoff Agenda](kickoff-agenda-template.md) |
| **Initiation / All** | [Decision Log](decision-log-template.md) |
| **Planning** | [Risk Register (RAID)](risk-register-template.md) |
| **Planning** | [Definition of Ready / Definition of Done](definition-of-ready-done-checklist.md) |
| **Execution** | [Weekly Status Update](weekly-status-update-template.md) |
| **Release** | [Release Readiness Checklist](release-readiness-checklist.md) |

---

## How to Use

1. Copy the relevant template file into your project's documentation folder (e.g., `docs/` in your repo).
2. Replace all `<!-- placeholder -->` comments and fields in `[brackets]` with your project-specific information.
3. Commit the completed template alongside your project docs so the whole team has a single source of truth.
4. Update the document throughout the lifecycle—don't let it go stale.
